title: Like Oil Running Down

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A G D Em F#)
How beautiful it is, the sight,
When hearts together shine so bright,
A bond of peace, a sacred art,
In unity, we find one heart.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A D G A Em)
Like oil cascading down the brow,
A priestly blessing here and now,
It flows from heaven's lofty peak,
The joy of kin, the love we seek.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (D G A Em F#)
Oh, how good, how sweet, how rare,
A love that lingers in the air.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (A G D Em F#)
Like oil that runs from Aaron’s head,
A sacred stream where grace is fed,
Like Hermon’s dew, so pure, so free,
The blessing flows eternally.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (A D G A Em)
From mountain heights to valleys low,
The harmony of heaven’s glow,
A space where life forever springs,
A place where angels spread their wings.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (F# A G D Em)
Oh, brothers, sisters, join the song,
In love’s embrace, we all belong,
No sweeter gift, no truer sign,
Where heaven’s will and earth align.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (A G D Em F#)
Like oil that runs from Aaron’s head,
A sacred stream where grace is fed,
Like Hermon’s dew, so pure, so free,
The blessing flows eternally.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (D G A Em)
Here in unity we stand,
A blessed work from heaven’s hand,
Eternal love, forever known,
In unity, we’re never alone.

epigraph: that went down to the skirts of his garments
